zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pantulf於1051年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾隆時，他的父親William Pantulf31歲，母親Béatrice de Normandie25歲。他於1077年與Lesceline Talon在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1112年4月16日在英國史洛普爾維姆享年61歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾洛-利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Pantulf于1051年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾隆时，他的父亲William Pantulf31岁，母亲Béatrice de Normandie25岁。他于1077年与Lesceline Talon在英国英格兰史洛普爾維姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1112年4月16日在英国史洛普爾維姆享年61岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯諾洛-利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pantulf was born in 1051, in Noron, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, his father, William Pantulf, was 31 and his mother, Béatrice de Normandie, was 25. He married Lesceline Talon in 1077, in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 16 April 1112, in Wem, Shropshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Noron-l'Abbaye, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pantulf est né en 1051, à Noron, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, William Pantulf, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Normandie, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lesceline Talon en 1077, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 16 avril 1112, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Noron-l'Abbaye, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pantulf 1051 in Noron, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pantulf 31 und seine Mutter Béatrice de Normandie 25. Er hat 1077 in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Lesceline Talon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 16. April 1112 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Wem, Shropshire, England und wurde in Noron-l'Abbaye, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Pantulf è nato il nel 1051 nel Noron, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, William Pantulf, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de Normandie, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lesceline Talon nel 1077, nel Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 16 aprile 1112, nel Wem, Shropshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Noron-l'Abbaye, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pantulfが1051年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスノーオンで生まれた時，父William Pantulfは31歳，母Béatrice de Normandieは25歳であった。1077年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムでLesceline Talonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1112年4月16日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで61歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスノーオン-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pantulf(이)가 1051년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 노런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pantulf(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de Normandie(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1077년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 w에서 Lesceline Talon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1112년 4월 16일 영국 슈럽실르 w에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 노론-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pantulf nasceu em 1051, em Noron, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, William Pantulf, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Normandie, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lesceline Talon em 1077, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de abril de 1112, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Noron-l'Abbaye, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pantulf родился в 1051 г. в местности норон, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени William Pantulf было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Normandie, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lesceline Talon в 1077 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 16 апреля 1112 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности норон-л'аббеи, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Pantulf nació en 1051, en Noron, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, William Pantulf, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Normandie, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lesceline Talon en 1077, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 16 de abril de 1112, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Noron-l'Abbaye, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
